title: Emote Tweaks (Emotecraft Team Continuation)
description: Allows you to play sounds with emotes with the help of simple voice chat.
body:
This is a fork of [another fork](https://modrinth.com/mod/emotetweaks) that makes the mod multi loader, and does 1.21+ ports.

This mod automatically plays wav files named the same as an emote's internal name when placed within the "emotes" folder.  
Also allows you to have emotes be or not be cancelled by crouching by adding a boolean variable called `crouchCancel` to the animation JSON.

Other voice chat mods might end up getting supported if I see that there is demand for it. (let me know in our discord server)

Dependencies:
* EmoteCraft
* SimpleVoiceChat  
 
Credit to RyanV for the original EmoteTweaks mod.  
Show appreciation to the original developer for their fantastic work!
